metadata.title: Go Tell It on the Mountain
metadata.subtitle: African American spiritual, Christmas (collected by John W. Work II, 1907)
metadata.lyricist: Traditional; verses commonly attributed to John W. Work II (1871–1925)
metadata.x_pd_basis: African American spiritual dating to at least 1865, formally published 1907 by John W. Work II (d. 1925). Both the song and its arrangers are > 95 years post-publication and > 100 years past Work's death
